globalNews.title: Tributes paid to David Hockney, a 'giant' and 'true icon' of British art
globalNews.summary: Hockney, one of the UK's most important and influential artists, has died at the age of 88.

globalNews.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims deal to end Iran war near
globalNews.summary: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.

globalNews.title: Discovery of €1.2m jewellery prompts fresh probe into former Spanish PM
globalNews.summary: José Luis Rodriguez Zapatero is suspected of being unable to show proof he paid import duties on the jewellery.

globalNews.title: Taylor Swift makes tearful 21-minute speech as she joins Songwriters Hall of Fame
globalNews.summary: The singer thanks her family as she becomes the youngest woman to be inducted into the Hall of Fame.

globalNews.title: More time needed for deadly Air India crash inquiry, officials say
globalNews.summary: A statement says "significant progress" has been made into investigating the crash, in which 260 people died a year ago.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
cryptoNews.summary: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.

cryptoNews.title: KuCoin has not paid $2M award tied to delisted token dispute, investor says
cryptoNews.summary: A Seychelles court said KuCoin can’t treat unwithdrawn tokens as “abandoned,” and awarded a Swiss investor over $2 million. He says the exchange still hasn’t paid and plans to sue again.

cryptoNews.title: Metaplanet to form securities arm through Siiibo acquisition
cryptoNews.summary: Metaplanet will acquire Siiibo Securities and rename it Metaplanet Securities as it builds out Project Nova, its Bitcoin-centric finance strategy in Japan.

cryptoNews.title: SpaceX tokenized IPO campaign draws $557M on Binance ahead of debut
cryptoNews.summary: Crypto markets are becoming a new venue for pre-IPO price discovery ahead of SpaceX's highly anticipated debut today.

aiNews.title: It’s hot IPO summer, and the MANGOS are ripe
aiNews.summary: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, N

aiNews.title: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
aiNews.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and mayb

aiNews.title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
aiNews.summary: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation.

aiNews.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
aiNews.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

aiNews.title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
aiNews.summary: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.
